summary: Iteration 16 - Customer Menu App Testing Complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend E2E test passed. Fixed critical bug: DeliveryLocation Pydantic model was not being converted to dict before MongoDB insert.
passed_tests: POST /api/customer/order/{tenant_id} - Create order with cash payment
POST /api/customer/order/{tenant_id} - Create order with card payment
Menu API returns multiple branches for selection

branch_selection.notes: Branch selection page displays all available branches with name, address, phone

menu_display.notes: Products displayed with images, prices, category filtering, search functionality

cart_functionality.notes: Add to cart, quantity adjustment, remove items, total calculation

checkout_page.notes: Customer info fields (name, phone, address), delivery notes, map location picker

map_location_picker.notes: Leaflet map integration with click-to-select and current location button

payment_methods.card: Working - Shows save card checkbox, redirects to Stripe

order_creation_api.notes: Creates order with delivery_location (lat/lng), branch_id, customer info

order_tracking.notes: Shows order status timeline, order details, payment method

stripe_integration.notes: Creates checkout session, handles payment status polling

bugs_fixed.issue: DeliveryLocation Pydantic model not converted to dict before MongoDB insert

critical_code_review_comments: DeliveryLocation model correctly serialized to dict for MongoDB storage
Branch selection flow works correctly with multiple branches
Customer info validation happens on frontend, backend is lenient
Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations library correctly
Order tracking timeline displays all status steps correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test orders with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 completed. Customer Menu App features all working: 1) Branch selection page displays branches correctly, 2) Menu view with products, categories, search, 3) Cart with quantity controls, 4) Checkout with customer info (name, phone, address), 5) Map location picker (Leaflet), 6) Payment methods (cash/card), 7) Stripe integration for card payments, 8) Order tracking page with status timeline. Fixed critical bug where DeliveryLocation Pydantic model was not being converted to dict before MongoDB insert.
